title: Tax exemption type catalogue
description: The 9 exemption types the module supports. Each entry documents the typical use case + certificate format + verification workflow + typical validity period. Consumers of the TaxExemptionType enum read this catalogue to build UX for the exemption submission flow.

exemption_types.description: Business buying goods for resale. Certificate proves the customer is registered to resell + will collect tax at the point of resale. Common in US B2B commerce.
exemption_types.typical_certificate_format: State-issued resale certificate (US) / EU VAT number (EU) / GST registration (CA/AU)

exemption_types.description: Charitable organization exempt from sales tax on purchases used for the charitable purpose. Requires 501(c)(3) status (US) or equivalent.
exemption_types.typical_certificate_format: IRS 501(c)(3) determination letter (US) / Charity Commission registration (GB) / etc.

exemption_types.description: Diplomatic missions + international organizations exempt from tax under bilateral / multilateral treaties (Vienna Convention).
exemption_types.typical_certificate_format: Diplomatic ID card / State Department diplomatic tax exemption letter

exemption_types.description: Farms / agricultural operations exempt from tax on inputs used for agricultural production. Common in US (state-specific).
Religious institution exempt from tax on purchases used for religious activities. Distinct from non_profit (broader carve-out in some jurisdictions).
Schools / universities exempt from tax on purchases for educational use. Partial exemption in many jurisdictions.
Federal / state / local government agencies exempt from tax. Applies at every level of government purchasing.
exemption_types.typical_certificate_format: Government purchase order OR government tax exemption certificate

exemption_types.description: Medical facilities exempt from tax on medical supplies + services. Applies in many US states + EU jurisdictions.
exemption_types.typical_certificate_format: State-issued medical exemption certificate + healthcare licence

exemption_types.description: Disabled individuals or organizations serving them exempt from tax on accessibility equipment + services.

notes: The exemption_type enum is the authoritative list. Adding a new type = updating this catalogue + updating the TaxExemptionType enum + adding a #[AsExemptionVerifier] class for jurisdictions with a public registry.

verification_registry_available=true = the module ships an #[AsExemptionVerifier] class for at least one (country, exemption_type) pair. Consumers of VerifyTaxExemptionJob use this catalogue to know whether to expect automatic verification or manual review.
